err_no_branch: Your account has no branch assigned. Ask a manager to set your branch before opening a shift.
err_network_retry: Network error — check your connection and try again.
err_cash_variance: Cash variance of {symbol}{amount} — please recount, then a manager can reconcile.
err_photo_type: Use a JPEG, PNG, WebP or HEIC image.
err_photo_too_big: Photo is over 10 MB — retake at a lower resolution.
err_photo_too_big_processed: Photo too large after processing — retake at a lower resolution.
err_photo_process: Could not process that photo — try again.
err_id_read: Could not read the ID — type it in manually.
err_id_no_number: Couldn’t read a number from that photo — try again or type it in.
id_low_confidence: ⚠️ Read with low confidence — please check it matches the ID.
id_captured: ✓ ID captured — please verify it matches.
err_id_timeout: ID scan timed out — type it in manually.
err_id_failed: ID scan failed — type it in manually.
err_consent_required: The sender must agree to the data-processing notice before you register the parcel.
err_photo_upload_failed: Photo upload failed — retake or skip the photo.
err_photo_upload_timeout: Photo upload timed out — check your connection and try again.
err_photo_upload_network: Photo upload failed — check your connection.
err_submit_timeout: Timed out — the parcel may not have been registered. Check the dispatch queue before retrying.
err_submit_network: Network error — the parcel was not registered. Try again.
shift_intro: Count your starting cash float before accepting parcels.
done_write_note: ✍️ Write this number on the parcel now. Handlers, drivers and managers scan it with their camera.
done_receipt_consent: 📲 Sender consented to a WhatsApp/SMS receipt & tracking updates.
sender_id_hint: Only collect if your branch requires sender ID. Stored securely and used solely for this shipment.
recv_id_hint: Checked when the receiver collects the parcel.
no_routes_notice: 🚧 No delivery routes set up from your branch yet. Ask your manager to add a route (Branch Dashboard → Routes), or use Door to Door.
destination_hint: Routes & prices are set by your manager.
shipping_fee_hint_auto: Auto-priced from the route — you can adjust it.
shipping_fee_hint_manual: Manager route rates apply by default — you can adjust this.
photo_intro: Take a clear photo of the sealed parcel. This is your proof of intake.
confirm_intro: Review, capture consent, then register the parcel.
consent_data_text: The sender agrees that AskBiz may store and process these details (including any ID number and photo) to carry and deliver this parcel. Data is kept only as long as needed for the shipment and legal records, and can be erased on request.
consent_receipt_text: The sender wants a WhatsApp/SMS receipt & tracking updates on {phone}.
close_intro: Count your cash and enter the total in the drawer.
